subject: Accounting
title: Automated Bank Feeds
description: A quick win: understand Automated Bank Feeds.

hook.text: Your software pulls in every bank transaction overnight. By morning, the books are nearly done.

buildup.text: Bank feeds automatically import transactions from bank accounts into the bookkeeping system.

discovery.text: The software learns patterns—rent goes to rent expense, a coffee shop charge goes to meals.

twist.text: Blind trust in automation is dangerous—miscategorized transactions can snowball into big errors.

climax.text: The best approach: let software suggest, but have a human verify every batch.

punchline.text: Automation starts the work. Humans finish it right.

quiz.question: What risk comes with automated bank feeds?
options: Transactions may be miscategorized without review
They cost too much to use
They only work with one bank
